emails.subject: Real Option Conference
emails.body: Real Option Conference Vince, I was brought to my attention that an interesting Real Option conference is taking place in March 27-28. I would like to attend this conference if possible. Thanks. Alex

emails.subject: Re: Real Option Conference
emails.body: Re: Real Option Conference Alex, No problem. Vince Alex Huang@ENRON 01/11/2001 05:12 PM
